reviews.text: Sierra did an amazing job capturing our proposal. Then worked with us to get our engagement photos later in the day. I am obsessed with all the photos from both sessions. She did a phenomenal job!!! The poses made us do and places she brought us to made the most perfect pictures. I couldn’t recommend her enough!

Sierra didn’t just photograph our engagement—she helped create one of the most meaningful moments of our lives. From the very beginning, her constant communication and deeply personal approach made us feel completely taken care of as a couple.

Planning an engagement from Monterrey, Mexico, without knowing Vail, the locations, or what to expect, was intimidating. Sierra gave me confidence from day one. She guided me through every detail with incredible patience, professionalism, and care, making sure everything was perfectly planned.

Most importantly, she played a huge role in keeping the engagement a complete surprise. My girlfriend had no idea what was coming, and the moment she realized what was happening was absolutely priceless. Sierra helped coordinate everything so smoothly that the surprise was perfect, and the emotions of that moment were captured beautifully.

Her attention, warmth, and dedication were present throughout the entire process—from planning to the final photos. If you are thinking about getting engaged in Vail and want a once-in-a-lifetime experience with someone who truly cares, Sierra is without question the photographer you need. We will be forever grateful.

From the moment we booked Sierra (and her husband Zane for videography), we knew we had made the right choice—and somehow they still exceeded every expectation.

We originally chose Sierra because of her style: bright, vibrant, and so full of life and love. But what truly sets her apart is the experience she creates. Planning a wedding in Southern California while they’re based in Colorado could have been stressful, but Sierra made it feel effortless. She consistently checked in, kept everything organized, and made sure our timelines were perfectly aligned. I never once felt out of the loop or unsure, she had everything handled.

On the wedding day, Sierra was incredible. She made taking photos feel easy and natural, which is saying a lot because posing can be more complex for us since my husband uses a wheelchair. She went above and beyond—clearly putting in time and care beforehand to research and prepare poses that would work beautifully for us. That level of intentionality meant so much, and it truly showed in the final photos. Every shot feels effortless, genuine, and full of emotion.

She also captured the most meaningful candid moments, the ones you don’t even realize are happening in the moment but end up meaning everything afterward. Looking through our gallery felt like reliving the entire day in the best way.

Zane’s videography tied everything together perfectly. He captured all the moments that made our wedding day so special and turned them into something we’ll cherish forever. The video complements Sierra’s photos so seamlessly it’s like we get to experience our wedding from every angle, over and over again.

I genuinely could not have imagined a better team to document our day. Sierra and Zane didn’t just provide photos and video, they gave us a way to relive one of the most important days of our lives, exactly how it felt.

If you’re considering booking them, do it. You will be beyond grateful that you did!

We loved the work Sierra did for our family photo shoot in Vail. She was responsive, professional, and did such great work during our time together. I realize shooting toddlers can be a challenge, but Sierra was patient, warm, and created a fun space for my girls during the shoot. She coordinated a great spot for our photos and delivered our photos under a week (!!) , definitely not expected but so appreciated in such a busy season. We look forward to having her shoot our family in the future and can not recommend her enough for family photos!

If you’re reading this and still searching for a photographer, stop here and hire Sierra. 10/10 personality and 11/10 photos!!!! She is  down to earth with a heart of gold 💗  Her natural ability to make you feel comfortable in front of the camera was amazing. I was nervous for our first family photos with a baby, but Sierra made it so easy… I didn’t even feel like we were posing for photos. I wish I could have had her by my side for my wedding day.

I will forever cherish these photos with our sweet girl and I can’t wait to force Sierra to come home to Ohio to take all of our photos in the future!!!
